title: The Great Physician now is near
firstLine: The Great Physician now is near,
publicDomainBasis: William Hunter (1811–1877), John Hart Stockton (1813–1877). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
The Great Physician now is near,
The sympathizing Jesus;
He speaks the drooping heart to cheer,
Oh, hear the voice of Jesus!

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Your many sins are all forgiv’n,
Oh, hear the voice of Jesus;
The veil ’twixt you and God is riven,
Redemption wrought by Jesus.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
All glory to the dying Lamb!
I now believe in Jesus;
I love the blessed Savior’s name,
I love the name of Jesus.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
His name dispels my guilt and fear,
No other name but Jesus;
Oh, how my soul delights to hear
The precious name of Jesus!
